text.title: Ads Attribution Models Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Ads Attribution Models. Each pairs symptom + sourced root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team sums Meta + Google + LinkedIn self-reports; total exceeds actual sales by 40%; budgets misallocated.
antipattern.fix: Set warehouse as truth; treat platform reports as inputs; rebuild reconciliation pipeline.

antipattern.symptom: Attribution model credits brand 30%; geo-holdout shows brand drives 0% incremental; budget wasted for 12 months.
antipattern.fix: Run quarterly geo-holdout per major channel; rebalance budget on true lift.

antipattern.symptom: Conversion window changed mid-quarter; apparent 25% variance triggers false alarm.
antipattern.fix: Freeze definitions quarterly; document change windows; communicate to reviewers.
